Hi, I'm Ayush Gupta

Bridging the gap between legacy database administration and scalable cloud architecture. Specialized in infrastructure-as-code, high-availability deployments, and constructing automated robust systems that handle failure gracefully.

View Pipelines Get In Touch

01. Tech Stack Matrix

Cloud Architecture

EC2, ECS, Fargate, CloudWatch, Shield & WAF engineering.

Containerization

Writing highly optimized multi-stage runtime Dockerfiles.

Kubernetes

Orchestrating microservices clusters and payload routing.

CI/CD Pipelines

GitHub Actions automation workflow development.

02. Automated Workloads

ayush@prod-bastion:~/projects

$ cat deployment-pipeline.yaml

Engineered a multi-tiered deployment orchestration file to build, run packages, and execute zero-downtime Java runtime updates seamlessly via container setups.

Docker Eclipse Temurin GitHub Actions

$ cat high-availability-db.conf

Leveraging 2+ years of database engineering to build resilient, reliable Oracle RAC structures combined with optimized HVR data streaming replication models.

Oracle RAC HVR Linux Performance Tuning

03. Establish Handshake

guest@web-terminal:~$ ping -c 3 ayushgupta.io
64 bytes from ayushgupta.io: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.042 ms
guest@web-terminal:~$ echo $CONTACT_CHANNELS
